name: 2-Box Stat Cluster
description: Two large stat boxes side by side, each with a value, label, and supporting context line

fields.TITLE_TEXT: Short descriptor shown above the two boxes, e.g. 'BY THE NUMBERS'
fields.STAT_VALUE_1: The left statistic value, e.g. '$4.5B' or '93%'
fields.LABEL_1: Short label under left stat, e.g. 'TOTAL LOSSES'
fields.SUB_1: One-line context for left stat, e.g. 'Reported across 14 countries'
fields.STAT_VALUE_2: The right statistic value, e.g. '200M' or '47 days'
fields.LABEL_2: Short label under right stat, e.g. 'RECORDS STOLEN'
fields.SUB_2: One-line context for right stat, e.g. 'Including names, SSNs, and card data'
